No other appearance is made in this matter. Court states statutory findings as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. Court congratulates and thanks counsel for job well done in this motion.

PLAINTIFF KATHERYN WILLIAMS Motion For Final Approval of Class Action Settlement is GRANTED. Settlement is approved. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHRIS BAKER OF BAKER & SCHWARTZ P.C., TEL. NO. 1-415-433-1064 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. LISA GORMAN OF FREEMAN MATHIS & GARY, TEL. NO. 1-415-689-1217 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - PLAINTIFF KATHERYN WILLIAMS' Motion Seeking An Order is continued to August 25, 2016 at 9:30 a.m in Dept. 302 for the Final Approval Hearing. Plaintiff to address the issues raised by the court regarding PAGA claims. The court find the $5,000.00 enhancement award to be reasonable. Plaintiff to serve the final papers to the Labor & Worklance Development Agency. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
